portrait.notes: Editorial and character portraits. Keeps quality at the model default.

landscape.notes: Wide scenes, environment concepts, travel-style images. Keeps quality at the model default.

product.notes: Cleaner product and packshot style outputs. Keeps quality at the model default.

portrait_clean.notes: Literal portrait preset with less stylization for controllable faces and wardrobe.

portrait_editorial.notes: More fashion/editorial energy while staying in RAW mode.

product_clean_square.notes: E-commerce friendly square framing with negative terms for common clutter.

product_editorial.notes: More premium ad-like product look for packaging, cosmetics, and hero shots.

environment_wide.notes: General environment and cinematic scene preset.

social_vertical.notes: Vertical mobile-first framing for reels, shorts, and storyboards.

character_sheet_wide.suffix: --ar 21:9 --s 75 --raw --v 8 --no duplicate body, extra limbs, extra characters, busy background
character_sheet_wide.notes: Wide character asset sheet preset for split-view layouts, turnarounds, and design-sheet style outputs.

concept_variety.notes: Adds moderate variety across the 4-image set when exploring directions.
